name: Fieldset
description: A semantic grouping container for related form fields with an accessible legend. Built on Base UI Fieldset with StyleX styling.

Root.description: Semantic grouping container for related form fields. Resets default browser fieldset styles.

disabled.description: Disables all form controls within the fieldset.

dataAttributes.data-disabled: Present when the fieldset is disabled.

Legend.description: Accessible label for the fieldset group.

intents.reasoning: Fieldset semantically groups related form controls with an accessible legend, which is essential for screen readers.
Fieldset's disabled prop cascades to all child form controls, providing a single switch to disable an entire group.
intents.composition:
<Fieldset.Root disabled>
  <Fieldset.Legend>Locked section</Fieldset.Legend>
  {/* All fields within are disabled */}
</Fieldset.Root>

avoidWhen.reasoning: Use Field alone. Fieldset is for grouping multiple related fields.

avoidWhen.scenario: Visual-only section dividers without semantic grouping
avoidWhen.reasoning: Use a heading or Separator for visual organization. Fieldset adds semantic grouping that affects assistive technology.
Use Accordion or Collapsible to wrap field groups that can be expanded/collapsed.

examples.name: disabled
examples.description: Disabled fieldset cascading to child controls
